title: BetterDrop
description: BetterDrops optimizes dropped items by merging them into infinite stacks to reduce lag and displays holographic names with counts for easy identification. Fully configurable in-game.
body:
BetterDrops is a quality-of-life mod designed to improve how dropped items behave in Minecraft. It reduces server lag by merging nearby items and provides clear visual information to the player.
# **Key Features:**

## Holographic Displays:

No more guessing! Automatically shows item names and counts floating above the items.

Visual Style: High-contrast text (White Name + Yellow Count) that is always readable, e.g., Diamond (x128).

Performance Optimized: Only renders when you are nearby.

## Smart & Infinite Merging:

Infinite Stacking: Overcomes the vanilla limit of 64! Items on the ground can merge into massive stacks (e.g., x1000+) to significantly reduce entity count and lag.

Radius Control: Items automatically merge within a configurable radius (Default: 5 blocks).

Safe Logic: Enchanted items or items with special NBT data will not merge to prevent data loss.

## Seamless Pickup:

Even if a stack on the ground has 500 items, picking it up works perfectly. The mod intelligently fills your inventory stack by stack.

## In-Game Configuration:

Press '0' to open the Settings Menu.

Toggle Item Names (On/Off).

Toggle Item Merging (On/Off).

Adjust Merge Radius (1-10 Blocks) via a slider.

All changes apply instantly without restarting the game.

<3
